instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: SolarWinds Serv-U
vulnerabilities.name: SolarWinds Serv-U Uncontrolled Resource Consumption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: SolarWinds Serv-U contains an uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability that allows specially crafted POST requests using the Content-Encoding: deflate header to crash the Serv-U service without authentication.
vulnerabilities.short_description: SolarWinds Serv-U contains an uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability that allows specially crafted POST...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
